observe: This room does something a door can't — it won't let two of you in together, no matter what either of us forgets.
fault: You reached for a lock that isn't yours to hold. The room already handles that part.
repair: Trust the structure. Enter, do your work, leave — the room enforces the rest.
escape: Move through cleanly — the room won't forgive a shortcut.

observe: Monitors provide built-in mutual exclusion for the code they contain.
fault: An external lock was attempted where a monitor already enforces exclusion.
repair: Enter and exit the monitor region correctly.
escape: Complete all required monitor entries before time expires.

hints: The exclusion is automatic here — focus on what you do inside, not on locking it yourself.
